states.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your filters or broadening the date range.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.load_failed: We couldn't load the data. Refresh the page or try again later.
errors.save_failed: We couldn't save your changes. Check the fields and try again.
errors.delete_failed: We couldn't delete this item. Please try again.
errors.invalid_value: The value you entered is not valid.
errors.billing_load_failed: We couldn't load your subscription. Please refresh the page.

categories.PRIMARY_hint: Packaging in direct contact with the product
categories.SECONDARY_hint: Outer box, mailer or wrap used for shipping
categories.TAPE_hint: Adhesive tape used to seal the shipment
categories.FILLER_hint: Void fill material (e.g. paper, bubble wrap, chips)

ai.section_subtitle: Review and accept each suggestion before it's applied.

paywall.subscription_required_body: Pick a plan to keep using the app and generating EPR reports.
paywall.subscription_processing: Your subscription is being processed. Refresh the page in a moment.
paywall.trial_banner: You're on a free trial — {{days}} days left.

onboarding.step_locked_hint: Complete the previous steps to unlock this one.

plan_selection.page_title: Pick the plan that fits you
plan_selection.trial_banner: Start with a {{days}}-day free trial — full access to every feature. Report downloads kick in after the trial ends.
plan_selection.country_lock_note: The country you pick stays locked until your annual renewal.
plan_selection.checkout_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
plan_selection.no_trial_note: Your free trial has already been used — you'll be charged right away.

subscription_page.title: Your subscription
subscription_page.trial_banner_body: You're on a free trial until {{date}}. Report downloads kick in after the trial ends.
subscription_page.country_locked_tooltip: Country stays locked until your next renewal ({{date}}).
subscription_page.upgrade_body: Unlock every available country for {{currency}}{{amount}}/year. Shopify handles the prorated charge — you can upgrade mid-cycle any time.
subscription_page.danger_zone_body: Cancel your subscription. You keep access until the end of the current billing period ({{date}}).

change_country.title: Change primary country
change_country.body: Your current country is {{country}}. Pick a new primary country below.
change_country.toast_locked: You can't change country until the next renewal ({{date}}).
change_country.toast_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

addon.title: Add an extra country
addon.body: Add a country to your Basic plan for {{currency}}{{amount}}/year. The add-on renews together with your main subscription.
addon.toast_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cancel.title: Cancel subscription?
cancel.body: Your access continues until {{date}}. After that, every feature is locked. You can resubscribe any time.
cancel.toast_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

end_trial.toast_failed: We couldn't end the trial. Please try again.

upgrade.toast_failed: Something went wrong during the upgrade. Please try again.
